title: [Office of Engineers]
description: Elongated sheets of parchment unfurl across the wood-planked walls of the office, the charcoal-sketched surfaces connected by thread-strung pins wrought into brass-winged beetles.  The tall mahogany bookshelves are overstuffed in a variety of leather-bound tomes and folios marked with strips of copper wire and scraps of velvet.  A rectangular glass lantern sits partially buried upon the well-oiled walnut table, wedged between the stacks of finely inked vellum and tool-filled rolls of brushed suede.
